title: Flower power!
abstract:
You must have heard the term "She's not just a pretty face."? This term can also be applied to
the lovely marigold flower, which is not just beautiful to look at, but is also a useful diagnostic
tool where Botrytis grey mold is concerned.
Botrytis grey mold (BGM) is a disease, caused by the fungus Botrytis cinerea, that mainly
attacks the reproductive structures of plants, especially the chickpea plant. Flower abortion is
a common symptom of the disease. The disease remains undiscovered until the signs of
damage become visible on the flower canopy (Fig. A). As a result, fungicides cannot be
applied early enough to control the disease...........
